name: Think Funding - New Application Submission
description: Triggered when a new application is submitted via API. Creates Microsoft Lists task, sends Teams notification, and email confirmation.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO [Tasks] (Title, Description, Status, Priority, RelatedEntityId, RelatedEntityType) VALUES ('New Application: {{$json.merchantName}}', 'Amount: {{$json.loanAmountRequested}}', 'Not Started', 'High', {{$json.applicationId}}, 'Application')

parameters.subject: Application Received - {{$json.applicationNumber}}
parameters.text: Your application has been received and is under review. We'll be in touch soon!
